vulnerability.reference: Practitioners trust fine-tuned agents as improved versions without auditing inherited failure modes.
vulnerability.generated: Automated debugging pipelines accept code that passes unit tests without human review or formal verification of logical correctness.

impact.reference: Amplification of subtle bugs across downstream applications as fine-tuned agents are widely adopted.
impact.generated: Subtle logical errors propagate into production systems, causing failures, data corruption, or security breaches.

dose_response.reference: Automated code generation agents producing plausible but incorrect code enables inheritance of subtle error patterns, which in fine-tuning open-weight SWE agents on synthetic trajectories exposes practitioners deploying fine-tuned code agents in automated debugging pipelines, leading to amplification of subtle bugs across downstream applications as fine-tuned agents are widely adopted.
dose_response.generated: Automated code generation agents produce plausible but incorrect code passing unit tests; deployed in automated debugging pipelines, this triggers acceptance without human review, causing subtle logical errors to propagate into production, leading to failures, data corruption, or security breaches.
